description: Display an image from a URL or base64 data URL.

src.description: Image URL or base64 data URL

objectFit.description: How the image fits its container

style.description: Inline CSS styles as a plain CSS string (e.g., "opacity: 0.8; border-radius: 8px")

propsSchema.description: Displays an image from a URL or base64 data URL. Useful for showing pasted images, charts, or any visual asset.
